description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a hip roof and a light blue exterior, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and various trees and shrubs. The front features a covered porch with white columns, a prominent entryway, and a driveway leading to a single-car garage. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors, with the upper story having a small balcony above the porch. The landscaping includes tall, narrow trees along the driveway and flowering trees at the corners of the lot. The house sits adjacent to a paved street, with a sidewalk and curb visible in front. The overall design is reminiscent of modern American suburban homes, blending traditional and contemporary elements.
description: A two-story light blue suburban house with a hip roof, covered porch, single-car garage, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by landscaped greenery and adjacent to a street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, garage, driveway, and landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain wall with minimal windows, lawn, and trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear/side view displaying the garage, driveway, upper balcony, and more of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Direct front view emphasizing the entryway, porch, garage, driveway, and the street-facing side of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white columns, steps, a single main door, and a small balcony above
